message:
ci: make bun linux e2e experimental

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/iioub2jlyiio4ybqvn9wgh5c

files.patch:
@@ -24,9 +24,15 @@ jobs:
 
   e2e-linux:
     strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
       matrix:
-        runtime: [node, bun]
+        include:
+          - runtime: node
+            experimental: false
+          - runtime: bun
+            experimental: true
 
+    continue-on-error: ${{ matrix.experimental }}
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:

@@ -122,7 +122,7 @@ docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build
 
 GitHub Actions runs:
 - Unit tests with `bun test` on Ubuntu + macOS
-- Linux mount e2e script on both Node and Bun (`tests/node-mount-test.ts`)
+- Linux mount e2e script on Node (required) and Bun (experimental) (`tests/node-mount-test.ts`)
